name: validation_wave1_baselines
purpose: Frozen public validation slice for selecting baseline context-system behavior before any final holdout run.
notes: Validation scenarios are frozen and should be used for selection rather than prompt or policy iteration.
No tuning-allowed split should appear in this manifest.
Shadow holdout remains private and is not part of this public selection slice.
Wave 2 adds a second frozen scenario per family for stronger within-family selection signal.
